summary: Planned conservative one-PR inventory classifications for 16 open pull requests using the hydrated preflight artifact as live state. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly not a dedupe cluster; no GitHub mutations, merges, closes, labels, comments, or fix PRs are planned.

actions.reason: Standalone translation PR with proof and passing checks; no duplicate/superseding evidence and merge is blocked by job frontmatter.

Standalone auth repair PR with proof/check blockers; keep open for maintainer/product review rather than security routing, closure, or merge.
Maintainer-owned PR with explicit maintainer signal and waiting-on-author status requires maintainer judgment in this plan-only shard.

Broad standalone formatting PR; no evidence supports duplicate or low-signal closeout, and merge/fix actions are blocked.

Related to the Discord typing fix family but not safe to mark duplicate or superseded from the compact artifact because scope differs and checks fail; keep open as related.
